text:
Once upon a time in a quaint little town called Willow Creek, there lived a young girl named Lily. She loved reading ancient stories and myths about birds. One evening, while wandering through the town's oldest library, she stumbled upon a forgotten tome filled with folklore. Among the tales were stories of owls and dreams. That night, as stars glittered mysteriously, Lily fell asleep listening to the sounds of owls. In her dreams, an owl like no other glided beside her. It whispered ancient wisdom, teaching her about dreams and destiny. The next morning, Lily woke feeling differently. She went to an old oak tree near the river which she admired. Offering thanks, she whispered about wishing to understand her dreams better. The owl flew up. Suddenly brilliant colors filled the sky, and it dropped a feather. Lily saw stars. Something profound clicked inside her. She decided to dedicate herself to helping those lost like dreams find their way.

Years passed, and Lily became known as the Dream
